claim: Claude Skills solve context rot—excessive context degrades LLM performance and increases hallucination, so skills load context only when relevant
actionable: When building systems with context-heavy instructions, use skills-style architecture to pull context conditionally rather than loading all context upfront.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Skills are deterministic, repeatable instructions with reference docs and scripts—unlike Projects which rely on non-deterministic LLM tool selection
actionable: For critical analysis or data processing tasks, use Skills with embedded Python/script logic rather than Projects that only give the model tool names.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Custom scripts in skills guarantee accuracy for data analysis whereas pure LLM analysis of data leads to hallucination
actionable: For financial, marketing, or analytics tasks, write explicit calculation scripts in your skill rather than asking the model to derive insights from raw data.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Projects are for team collaboration with persistent context and memories; Skills are for specialized, repeatable, task-specific workflows
actionable: Use Projects for team-based chat and context sharing; use Skills for automation and deterministic task execution that doesn't need conversation.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Sub-agents in Claude Code are useful for breaking complex tasks into specialized agents with isolated context windows
actionable: For multi-stage workflows, spin up sub-agents with specialized system instructions and isolated context rather than keeping everything in one agent.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Training Claude like a junior teammate—giving guard rails, the right amount of context (not too much), tools upfront, then gradually expanding—improves performance
actionable: Don't overload AI systems with all context at once; incrementally introduce context and capabilities as the system demonstrates competence.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: AI adoption is falling because companies lack AI fluency and proper prompting techniques, not because AI doesn't work
actionable: Invest in internal AI education and prompting standards across your organization to realize AI ROI rather than expecting AI tools to work without proper usage.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Building artifacts and skills is a repeatable product—you can create once and share as a URL or sell as a standalone product
actionable: When building Skills, create them as modular products that can be shared via URL or packaged; treat them as sellable assets.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Frameworks matter for agent tasks—providing a clear framework (e.g., experiment pipeline, impact, confidence) makes analysis structured and reproducible
actionable: Define explicit frameworks and output structures for agent tasks; don't ask for 'insights'—define exactly what structure you expect.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: Reference files in Skills allow you to define domain-specific glossaries, metrics, and standards that the skill adheres to
actionable: Create a metrics definition and glossary document for your domain; reference it in Skills so the model uses your exact definitions.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)

claim: One-shot generation of long-form content from examples works when you provide reference examples and detailed output expectations
actionable: For content generation tasks, include 2-3 reference examples of your desired output style; one-shot generation often works without iteration.
source_title: Claude Skills Built Me an AI Agent Army (They Run Everything Now)
